boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback provenance current and matched to vendor master contact.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Unmatched callback log dependency remains open
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Callback log must match authorized contact and action

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: Execution may not proceed. The controlling control record and policy both require the exact callback provenance to match the authorized contact and action, and the packet shows that dependency remains missing, stale, or mismatched. Escalation is required until source records close the boundary.
open_blockers: callback log must match authorized contact and action
